category.name: zoo.inventory
category.item: How many do you want to sell?
If you want to move your animals with enclosures to your inventory, they must first be healthy and satisfied.

category.name: zoo.inventory.trash
category.item: Environmental protection with reuse: Recycle waste at a recycling facility and use the raw materials to make something needed.

category.name: zoo.inventory.pawprints
category.item:
The more you take care of your animals, the more paws you will collect. You can then use them to improve your enclosures.

Current amount of paws collected:

category.name: zoo.inventory.pearls
category.item:
The more you take care of your animals, the more pearls you will earn to beautify your habitats.

Current pearl status:

category.name: zoo.inventory.inventory
category.item:
EVERYWHERE IS EMPTY?
Your inventory is currently empty.
Why don't you check out the store or go on a safari?

category.name: zoo.inventory.gifts
category.item: How beautiful! Your friend sent you a gift. Quickly, unwrap it!
What a shame! You don't have any new gifts at the moment... But don't be sad, something will come soon.

category.name: zoo.inventory.move
category.item: How many animals do you want to pay for?

category.name: zoo.inventory.allin
category.item: Are you sure you want to send everything to the inventory? Warning: Your animals must be clean, fed, and happy before you can do this.
